title: centaurea leucophaea var. ochrolopha
intro: Centaurea leucophaea var. ochrolopha, commonly known as Cornflower, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Cornflower include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Cornflower often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
